subcodes.first_line: O Nushiravan! Quaff thou the cup of that celestial wine from the divine winehouse! May thy spirit ever flow with the wine of love as long as thou art able [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوشیروان ساغر آن باده از خمخانه یزدان نوش روانت باد تا توانی از می مهر
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @love and unity
